title: Flea Treatment in Hewlett, NY | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC

intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Hewlett home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Hewlett and the Five Towns area. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at all life stages, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Hewlett homeowners for years with reliable, effective flea extermination services. We understand the unique challenges of Long Island properties and offer customized treatment plans with guaranteed results and competitive pricing between $350-$650.
localContext: Hewlett's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to Hewlett Bay Park create ideal conditions for flea activity, especially in homes with pets. From the classic colonials near Everit Avenue to modern homes throughout the Five Towns, we protect all types of Hewlett residences from flea infestations year-round.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Hewlett range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours. However, because fleas have multiple life stages, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks with our follow-up treatments to ensure all eggs and larvae are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We'll provide specific instructions on any temporary precautions, such as keeping pets off treated areas until surfaces are dry, typically 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Hewlett and the surrounding Five Towns area. Fleas multiply quickly, so we prioritize rapid response to prevent infestations from worsening. Call us for immediate assistance.
